taskId.description: The task ID experiencing the error

errorMessage.description: The error message or description of what failed

errorType.description: Optional explicit error type classification (auto-detected from errorMessage if omitted)

previousLevels.description: Escalation levels already attempted for this error

completedSteps.description: Steps completed before the error (used for force-done output)

failedAt.description: The step or action that failed (used for force-done output)

recommendation.description: Optional human-facing recommendation for force-done output

forceLevel.description: Force entry at a specific escalation level (overrides auto-classification)
